CVE-2023-1436.title: An infinite recursion is triggered in Jettison when constructing  ...
CVE-2023-1436.description: An infinite recursion is triggered in Jettison when constructing a JSONArray from a Collection that contains a self-reference in one of its elements. This leads to a StackOverflowError exception being thrown.

CVE-2023-5072.title: Denial of Service  in JSON-Java versions up to and including 2023 ...
CVE-2023-5072.description: Denial of Service  in JSON-Java versions up to and including 20230618.  A bug in the parser means that an input string of modest size can lead to indefinite amounts of memory being used.
